description_long: This is a life-sized adult male figure dressed in a military-style flight suit adorned with various patches, including insignia and a name tag. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and wears aviator sunglasses, giving a distinct pilot or aviator appearance. The suit is detailed with realistic folds and creases, and the patches are placed on the chest, arms, and shoulder, including a visible American flag. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and the figure stands in a natural, slightly forward-leaning posture. The shoes are simple and functional, matching the utilitarian look of the outfit. The overall appearance suggests a professional, disciplined individual, likely representing a pilot or aircrew member in an urban or airfield context.
description: A standing adult male figure in a detailed military-style flight suit with patches and aviator sunglasses, posed in a relaxed, natural stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full flight suit, aviator sunglasses, chest and arm patches, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the side patches, and the straight leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flight suit, the hair, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, right arm patches, and the natural stance.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style flight suit with patches and aviator sunglasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with a slight forward lean
